name: zika-playwright-tests
description: Playwright E2E tests for Zika Chinese Learning Cards

scripts.test: npm run cleanup && playwright test && npm run force-cleanup
scripts.test:headed: npm run cleanup && playwright test --headed && npm run force-cleanup
scripts.test:debug: npm run cleanup && playwright test --debug && npm run force-cleanup
scripts.test:ui: npm run cleanup && playwright test --ui && npm run force-cleanup
scripts.test:record: npm run cleanup && playwright test --headed --video=on --screenshot=on && npm run force-cleanup
scripts.test:safe: npm run cleanup && playwright test --workers=1 && npm run force-cleanup
